title: Salesforce-to-Salesforce Instance Object and Field Mapping
story: As a data migration specialist, I want to map data fields and objects between two Salesforce instances, so that I can track how data migrates between organizations.
description:
## Context

When managing data across multiple Salesforce instances, users need to define explicit mappings between objects and fields in a source instance and their counterparts in a target instance. This mapping provides visibility into how data flows during migrations.

## Behavior

- Users select a source Salesforce instance and a target Salesforce instance from the connected instances list.
- For each object in the source instance, users can map it to a corresponding object in the target instance.
- Within a mapped object pair, users can map individual fields from the source object to fields in the target object.
- Mappings are persisted and can be reviewed to understand the data migration path between organizations.
acceptance_criteria: User can select a source and target Salesforce instance for mapping
User can map a source object to a corresponding target object
User can map individual fields between mapped source and target objects
Mappings are saved and persist across sessions
User can view existing mappings to understand data migration paths between instances
ux_changes: New mapping interface allowing users to select source and target instances, map objects between them, and map fields within matched object pairs.
middleware_changes: Logic to validate and persist object-to-object and field-to-field mappings between Salesforce instances.
data_model_changes: New tables or models to store object mappings (source instance object → target instance object) and field mappings within each object pair.
api_changes: Endpoints for creating, reading, and managing object and field mappings between two Salesforce instances.
implementation_notes: Depends on MBT-932 for multi-instance authentication and object/metadata fetching. Mapping relies on objects and metadata already being available for both instances.
comment_summary: Developer marked the feature as ready for review on the development environment.
